name: leave-management-system
description: Full-stack Leave Management System with Vue.js frontend and Node.js/Express backend

scripts.install:all: yarn run install:backend && yarn run install:frontend
scripts.build: yarn run install:all && yarn run build:frontend
scripts.dev: yarn run install:all && concurrently "yarn run start:backend" "yarn run start:frontend"
scripts.heroku-postbuild: yarn run install:frontend && yarn run build:frontend
